stories.title: Claude Sonnet 5 Launches: Near-Opus Performance at Sonnet Pricing, Default for All Users
stories.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Sonnet 5 as the default model for all Free and Pro users, delivering near-Opus 4.8 performance at $2/$10 introductory pricing. The model excels at agentic tasks with 63.2% agentic coding benchmark scores.

stories.title: Department of Commerce Lifts Export Controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
stories.summary: The US Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, allowing broader international access to these frontier AI systems.

stories.title: Five Eyes Intelligence Alliance Warns AI-Powered Cyberattacks Are Months Away
stories.summary: The Five Eyes intelligence alliance issued a joint warning that AI-powered cyberattacks are months away, not years, urging governments and enterprises to accelerate defensive preparations.

stories.title: California Signs Landmark Anthropic Deal: All State Agencies Get Claude at 50% Off
stories.summary: California became the largest US government AI deployment in history, signing a deal giving all state agencies and local governments access to Anthropic's Claude at 50% off, with the Poppy assistant rolling out to 300,000 workers.

stories.title: CREATE AI Act: Rare Bipartisan Bill Moves Through Congress to Fund AI Research Infrastructure
stories.summary: The bipartisan CREATE AI Act would permanently establish the National AI Research Resource at the NSF, giving universities and startups access to supercomputing power currently concentrated in big tech companies.

stories.title: GPT-5.6 Sol on Cerebras: 750 Tokens Per Second Changes Interactive AI
stories.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol model running on Cerebras hardware achieves 750 tokens per second, enabling truly interactive real-time AI experiences that were previously impossible.

stories.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Science: Dedicated AI Research App for Drug Discovery
stories.summary: Anthropic released Claude Science, a dedicated AI application purpose-built for drug discovery and biology research, marking the company's first vertical-specific product.

stories.title: Meta Caps Internal AI Token Spending After Costs Approach Billions in 2026
stories.summary: Meta has imposed internal caps on AI token spending after costs ballooned toward billions of dollars in 2026, signaling growing corporate concern about AI operational expenses.

stories.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image and Gemini 3 Pro Image Released in Google AI Studio
stories.summary: Google released new Gemini image generation models — Gemini 3.1 Flash Image and Gemini 3 Pro Image — in Google AI Studio, expanding its multimodal AI capabilities.

stories.title: Grok 4.3 Arrives on Amazon Bedrock at $1.25/$2.50 Per Million Tokens
stories.summary: xAI's mid-tier Grok 4.3 model is now available on Amazon Bedrock at competitive pricing of $1.25/$2.50 per million tokens, giving AWS users another frontier model option.
